entity.label: Zeredah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A place in the plain of Jordan; the same as Zarthan (2 Chr. 4:17; 1 Kings 7:46). Here Solomon erected the foundries in which Hiram made the great castings of bronze for the temple.

nodes.label: Zeredah
nodes.description: A place in the plain of Jordan; the same as Zarthan (2 Chr. 4:17; 1 Kings 7:46). Here Solomon erected the foundries in which Hiram made the great castings of bronze for the temple.

verses.text: In the plain of Jordan did the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zeredathah.
